angle.description: What to pay attention to when analyzing the video segment. For example: 'focus on user confusion around the checkout flow' or 'look for UI rendering issues'.

end_timestamp.description: End timestamp within the session in hh:mm:ss format (e.g. '00:03:00').

session_id.description: The session recording ID to analyze.

start_timestamp.description: Start timestamp within the session in hh:mm:ss format (e.g. '00:01:30').
